name: Noir Thriller
description: Hard-boiled detective noir — Blade Runner meets Se7en, rain-slicked streets
art_style: Neo-noir cinematic digital art. High contrast chiaroscuro, wet reflective surfaces, rain-soaked urban environments. Neon signs bleeding through fog. Silhouettes against backlit windows. Think Blade Runner 2049 meets Sin City.
color_palette: Near-monochrome with selective color pops — electric neon cyan, hot pink, acid yellow bleeding through deep blacks and charcoal greys. Chromatic aberration on edges.
quality_tags: Ultra cinematic, noir lighting, anamorphic lens flare, rain particles, wet surface reflections, volumetric fog, dramatic shadows, ultra-detailed environments.
negative_prompt: bright daylight, cheerful, cartoon, anime, flat lighting, pastel colors, clean sterile environments, generic, blurry, low quality, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks.
